since_last: 63% of 89 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +1.64%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 63% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.22% · BTC +2.17% · Gold +1.57% · Nasdaq100 -1.54%. 63% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +1.64%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +1.64%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -0.70%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AVAV is the standout at +5.54%
cards.body: Leaders: AVAV +5.54%, AMAT +3.47%, KLAC +3.31%, CEVA +3.27%, LRCX +3.13%. Laggards: BIDU -3.55%, SNOW -2.04%, ZS -1.93%, APP -1.88%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.49% at $159.88
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.49% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
